house_cusps.signification: Self, personality, physical body, appearance, health, beginning of life.
Wealth, family, speech, primary education, food, assets, face.
Courage, short travels, siblings, communication, writing, efforts, hands.

yogas.name: Gaja Kesari Yoga
yogas.meaning: Jupiter in a quadrant from the Moon. Brings intelligence, wisdom, prosperity, reputation, and virtuous qualities.

yogas.name: Sasa Yoga
yogas.meaning: Saturn is strong in a Kendra house. Commanding power, authority, loyalty, long-lasting assets, hard-working mindset.
